data.title: Bitcoin Coinbase Premium Index Hits 2024 High as BTC Rallies 5%
data.description:
The Bitcoin (BTC) coinbase premium index reached its highest level since February 20 after BTC prices rallied 5% on March 19. This index measures the price difference between Coinbase and Binance prices for BTC pairs, where a higher value signals stronger buying pressure from US investors. The index gauges US retail interest, but it may also signal strong accumulation from US institutions and whales, according to a verified analyst on CryptoQuant. The 30-day EMA of the index crossed the 100-day EMA level, implying the presence of large players. Past trends show that when this indicator rises, BTC bull markets tend to continue, indicating a high likelihood of an accumulation phase and a key moment to monitor BTC’s momentum. Coinbase Pro was integrated into Coinbase Advanced in early 2024, which is used by companies for BTC purchases, suggesting that the Coinbase premium also represents US institutional interest to a certain extent.

One of the major positives observed on BTC’s 1-day chart is the bullish reclaim on the 200-day exponential moving average. When prices remain above the 200-day EMA level, the probability of an uptrend increases for BTC to form higher highs in the chart. After a successful breakout above $85,000 resistance, turning the level into support further improves the possibility of a $90,000 retest. On the daily chart, Bitcoin price also bounced from the lower range of the Bollinger Bands, with the metric’s moving average remaining above the $90,000 level. The bullish narrative is invalidated if a daily candle closes below $85,000 before the end of the week. Michael Van de Poppe, the founder of MN Consultancy, shared a bullish stance and said that he expects a continued run to retest $90,000 over the next few days. However, Max, the founder of BecauseBitcoin, said BTC might have a “little more work to do.” The analyst said the EMA cloud indicators continue suppressing BTC below the $88,000 and $90,000 range. Similarly, crypto trader Koroush AK suggested traders remain cautious until a shift in market structure occurs. The trader noted that Bitcoin prices are currently at a critical level below $90,000; the chance of a correction below $73,000 remains a threat.

data.title: ZEEKR's Q4 2024 Earnings Call: Discrepancies in Financial Outlook, Market Strategy, and Product Launches
data.description:
These are the key contradictions discussed in ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited's latest 2024 Q4 earnings call, specifically including: Financial Projections, Market Expansion Strategy, and Product Launch Timelines:



Sales and Revenue Growth:
- ZEEKR Group delivered 500,000 vehicles in 2024, with the Lynk & Co brand delivering 280,000 units, marking a 30% year-over-year increase. The ZEEKR brand's deliveries surpassed 222,000 vehicles, representing an 87% year-over-year increase.
- The growth was attributed to strategic product expansion and enhancements in intelligent features, as well as the successful equity transaction with Geely Holdings.

Profitability and Cost Management:
- ZEEKR Group achieved a vehicle revenue of RMB55.5 billion, with a total RMB75.9 billion in revenue for 2024. The vehicle gross margin improved to 17.3% in Q4 and 15.6% for the full year.
- The improved profitability was due to strong product competitiveness, cost discipline in supply chain management, and operational efficiencies.

Technological Advancements and AI Integration:
- ZEEKR Group's full stack in-house development capabilities, including vehicle architecture, AI-driven powertrains, and autonomous driving, have positioned it as a leader in the industry.
- The group's investment in AI and autonomous driving technologies has contributed to the development of advanced systems, such as the first mass-produced end-to-end AI-powered large model and a nationwide rollout of map-free NZP.

Expansion into Global Markets:
- By 2025, ZEEKR aims to have 10% of its annual sales target come from the international market.
- The expansion strategy includes establishing a unified sales company for global markets and introducing new products tailored for the mainstream global markets, such as the Lynk & Co 08 EM-P and the ZEEKR 7X.

data.title: Aragon Launches Modular Governance Tools for Onchain Organizations
data.description:
Aragon, a leading innovator in onchain governance technology, has unveiled a suite of new modular governance products designed to revolutionize the way onchain organizations operate and accrue value. The launch, announced on March 20th, 2025, aims to streamline decision-making processes, enhance token value, and provide customizable frameworks for onchain organizations.

The new tooling is set to empower projects to create modular governance systems that can adapt over time, ensuring real ownership, accountability, and sustainable growth. This development comes at a pivotal moment as imminent regulatory clarity is expected to pave the way for crypto founders and institutional players to create and distribute value onchain at scale. Aragon's latest offering seeks to move beyond the monolithic frameworks that have traditionally limited organizations' abilities to scale without stifling innovation.

In contrast to the prevalent token-based voting models, which have often been criticized for their ineffectiveness and lack of utility in decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs), Aragon's new products propose effective governance models that are readily available. These models focus on long-term strategies for accruing and distributing value among stakeholders who have a vested interest in the organization's success, utilizing gauges to improve resource allocation and ensure token value accrual.

Key features of the new tooling include a modular organization builder that allows founders to design custom governance structures tailored to their specific needs. Additionally, the tooling offers customizable access control and permission management for enhanced security, no-code governance templates to save time and resources, modularized veLockers for long-term incentive alignment, and gauges to improve resource allocation and ensure token value accrual.

Several partners, including Puffer, Mode, and Bedrock, have already adopted Aragon's new technology to advance their infrastructure and improve resource allocation discipline at the organizational level. This adoption ensures that value accrues back to token holders, demonstrating the practical benefits of Aragon's innovative approach.

Anthony Leutenegger, CEO of Aragon, highlighted the significance of the launch, stating that 2025 is often referred to as the 'year of the fee switch,' where fundamentals and value accrual back to tokens become critical competitive advantages. He emphasized that the new Aragon app and Aragon Value Accrual Toolkit empower organizations to maximize the value they create and effectively distribute this value to stakeholders most aligned with their long-term success.

Aragon's legacy in modern governance systems is well-established, with continued adoption from leading projects such as lido, Curve, Decentraland, Polygon, and Taiko. The combined vision for Aragon's latest release and developments in value accrual mark a significant step toward a better landscape for onchain and tokenomics-driven governance, providing greater opportunities for organizations to effectively manage their assets and further accelerate the industry's growth.

For more information about Aragon's modular governance tooling, users can visit the official website at https://www.aragon.org/. Aragon builds secure and modular onchain governance technology, having deployed the first dao framework in 2017 and powered the creation of over 7500 DAOs, securing over $35 billion in value for leading projects.

data.title: Mutuum Finance (MUTM) Surges 25% as Whales Accumulate Low-Cost DeFi Token
data.description:
As the crypto market prepares for its next major cycle, large investors, commonly referred to as whales, are shifting their focus towards a low-cost token with significant upside potential. While many established assets have already experienced substantial price increases, newer projects with strong fundamentals and real utility are attracting serious attention. One such project leading this shift is Mutuum Finance (MUTM), a decentralized finance (DeFi) lending and borrowing protocol currently priced at just $0.02.

Mutuum Finance operates as a decentralized non-custodial liquidity protocol, allowing users to lend, borrow, and mint an overcollateralized stablecoin. The platform functions as a self-sustaining DeFi ecosystem, ensuring continuous activity from both borrowers and lenders. Lenders deposit assets into Mutuum’s liquidity pools, earning interest as their funds are utilized for loans. Borrowers, on the other hand, secure liquidity by locking collateral, enabling them to access funds without selling their holdings. This process creates a constant flow of capital within the protocol, ensuring that MUTM remains an actively used and in-demand token.

One of Mutuum’s standout features is its overcollateralized stablecoin, which provides liquidity without needing a pre-supplied user pool. Stablecoins are minted when borrowers deposit excess collateral, ensuring that each unit is fully backed and remains stable. Unlike traditional stablecoins that require centralized reserves, Mutuum’s model ensures decentralization and reduces de-pegging risks.

Crypto whales are drawn to Mutuum Finance due to its long-term, high-reward investment potential. Unlike many low-cost tokens that rely solely on market hype, MUTM has a structured economic model designed to sustain continuous demand and price growth. One of the biggest factors driving whale accumulation is Mutuum’s buy-and-distribute model. A portion of platform fees is used to buy MUTM from the open market, ensuring steady buy pressure. These purchased tokens are then distributed to mtTOKEN holders, creating ongoing demand while preventing excessive sell pressure.

As more users engage with Mutuum’s lending markets and stablecoin transactions, the platform’s revenue and buyback volume increase, further reinforcing MUTM’s price stability and growth potential. With MUTM currently priced at $0.02, a $1,500 investment would secure 75,000 tokens. As demand for the lending platform increases and whale accumulation continues, MUTM is expected to experience substantial price appreciation. When the token reaches $1, those 75,000 MUTM tokens would be worth $75,000, turning a $1,500 investment into a life-changing return. This reflects a 50x increase, a level of growth that has been seen in past DeFi projects with strong adoption and real-world use cases.

Mutuum Finance’s presale has already surpassed $4 million in funding, with over 6,300 holders securing their positions. So far, 300 million tokens have been sold, and with demand accelerating, the token is poised to surge up to 25% in the next phase before reaching its official launch price of $0.06. For investors entering now, the guaranteed 3x return at launch is just the beginning. Analysts believe MUTM’s structured tokenomics and strong platform adoption will drive further growth, making it one of the most compelling under-$0.10 investments before the next bull market takes off.

With real-world utility, a structured economic model, and growing whale interest, Mutuum Finance is emerging as one of the strongest investment opportunities in 2025. Unlike many speculative low-cap tokens, MUTM is backed by an active DeFi platform, ensuring that its demand is sustained through lending activity and stablecoin interactions. With the presale nearing completion and investor accumulation accelerating, MUTM reaching $1 in the coming months is becoming an increasingly likely scenario. For those looking to enter before the next major crypto rally, Mutuum Finance offers one of the best opportunities at its current low price.

data.title: Bitcoin Surges 5% to $90,000 as Long Positions Soar 650%
data.description:
Bitcoin's recent price surge, coupled with increased whale activity and a high Long/Short Ratio, has sparked optimism among traders and investors, suggesting a potential bullish momentum towards the $100,000 mark. The cryptocurrency has shown remarkable resilience, maintaining levels above $85,000, which has encouraged bullish sentiment and set the stage for potential advancements towards the significant resistance level of $95,000. Analysts have noted that a sustainable hold above $85,000 could reinforce buying pressure, pushing Bitcoin towards $95,000.

The recent rally in Bitcoin's price can be largely attributed to the increasing number of traders opting for long positions. As of early 2025, the number of long positions reached a remarkable peak, with around 80,000 traders holding these positions. Meanwhile, the number of short positions dwindled to approximately 20,000. This market imbalance resulted in a price increase to $90,000, driven by heightened buying pressure that surpasses the critical quantity of 320. The Long/Short Ratio has surged to an impressive 650, greatly exceeding the critical threshold of 320, indicating strong bullish sentiment among traders.

The current market dynamics have also seen a significant liquidation of short positions, with over $200 million worth cleared at the $85,000 mark. Notably, in just a three-day span, approximately $500 million in short positions were liquidated between the $80,000 and $85,000 range, adding further fuel to the bullish momentum. As bearish traders were forced to close their positions, this created a path for upward movement in Bitcoin’s price.

In summary, Bitcoin’s recent price movements showcase a robust market characterized by an increase in long positions and significant whale activity. The potential to reach $95,000 hinges on sustaining the price above $85,000, coupled with ongoing positive sentiment and liquidation dynamics. As this environment persists, market participants remain optimistic about Bitcoin’s future price trajectory. The market's response to these developments underscores the cryptocurrency's resilience and its potential for substantial growth in the near future.

data.title: Husky Inu Presale Surpasses $730,000, Attracts Investors with Innovative Features
data.description:
Husky Inu (HINU) has emerged as a promising new project in the rapidly evolving meme coin ecosystem, which has become one of the most lucrative niches in the crypto market. Established projects like Dogecoin (DOGE), Shiba Inu (SHIB), Dogwifhat (WIF), and Pepe (PEPE) dominate the space, but new projects are constantly entering the market, often leading to heavy losses for investors. Husky Inu stands out due to its comprehensive roadmap and innovative features, attracting significant attention from the community.

Husky Inu aims to leverage the capabilities of the Solana blockchain to bring utility and value to token holders and supporters. The project focuses on creating a strong and supportive community with enhanced rewards and innovative features. The presale of Husky Inu has been highly successful, surpassing the $730,000 milestone. Interested users can buy or stake the hinu token using various cryptocurrencies, including BTC, SOL, LTC, ETH, DOGE, TRON, and others. The project is also developing an Earn App and a decentralized exchange. The Earn App will reward users for interacting with the protocol and completing simple tasks, while the decentralized exchange will facilitate decentralized trading and improve the utility of the HINU token.

The HINU token, the native token of Husky Inu, has several unique features that set it apart from competitors. These include quick transactions facilitated by the Solana blockchain, a deflationary supply mechanism to ensure scarcity and value, and a charity voting system that allocates 5% of the token supply toward community rewards and user-supported charities. Additionally, the Earn App rewards users with HINU tokens for interacting with the project and completing tasks like watching, liking, and sharing videos.

Husky Inu's tokenomics prioritize the creation of a reliable token ecosystem with a well-defined token distribution model and a fixed supply capped at $100 billion. The token allocation includes 30% for marketing efforts and partnerships, 25% for the liquidity pool, 30% for the initial token sale, 5% for the Husky Inu team and advisors, 5% for the development of the Husky Inu ecosystem, and 5% for the Husky Inu community and community rewards.

The project's roadmap is divided into three phases. Phase 1 includes concept development, social media setup, presale marketing campaigns, community building, and tech development. Phase 2 focuses on token launch, achieving 5,000+ holders, listings on CoinGecko and CoinMarketCap, CEX listings, influencer partnerships, staking and yield farming, and a global marketing campaign. Phase 3 aims to achieve a $1 billion market cap, 300,000+ holders, 35+ CEX listings, viral marketing, high-profile partnerships, regular updates and AMA sessions, and the launch of the Husky Inu App/Exchange.

Investors still have the opportunity to join the Husky Inu presale and support the project. To participate, users need to connect their wallet, select the network, and specify the amount of cryptocurrency they wish to trade for HINU tokens. The project's official Telegram channel is available for support in case of any issues.

Husky Inu's success in the meme coin ecosystem can be attributed to its innovative features, strong community support, and a well-defined roadmap. The project's focus on utility, deflationary supply, and community rewards sets it apart from other meme coins. As the project continues to develop and gain traction, it has the potential to become a significant player in the meme coin ecosystem, challenging established projects and attracting new investors.

data.title: Maximize Your Tax Savings: Claiming the Student Loan Interest Deduction
data.description:
In the world of personal finance, every dollar saved is a dollar earned. One often overlooked way to reduce your taxable income is through the Student Loan Interest Deduction. This deduction allows you to subtract up to $2,500 of the interest paid on qualified student loans from your taxable income. But how do you claim it, and what are the rules and income limits you need to know? Let's dive in.



Understanding the Student Loan Interest Deduction

The Student Loan Interest Deduction is a federal income tax deduction that allows borrowers to subtract up to $2,500 of the interest paid on qualified student loans from their taxable income. This deduction is claimed as an adjustment to income on Form 1040, meaning you don't need to itemize your deductions to claim it. This makes it a valuable tool for reducing your taxable income, especially for those who are still paying off their student loans.

Eligibility Criteria

To claim the Student Loan Interest Deduction, you must meet several key eligibility criteria:

1. Qualified Student Loan: The loan must have been taken out solely to pay qualified higher education expenses for you, your spouse, or a dependent. The expenses must be for an academic period for an eligible student and paid or incurred within a reasonable period of time before or after taking out the loan.

2. Legal Obligation to Pay Interest: You must be legally obligated to pay interest on a qualified student loan.

3. Filing Status: Your filing status cannot be "married filing separately."

4. Dependent Status: Neither you nor your spouse (if filing jointly) can be claimed as a dependent on someone else's return.

5. Modified Adjusted Gross Income (MAGI): Your MAGI must be below a specified amount, which is set annually. For the tax year 2023, the MAGI limit is $90,000 for single filers and $185,000 for joint filers. The deduction phases out for single filers with MAGIs of $75,000 to $90,000 and joint filers with MAGIs of $155,000 to $185,000.

How the Phaseout Works

The phaseout of the Student Loan Interest Deduction based on MAGI significantly impacts taxpayers in different income brackets. For the tax year 2023, the deduction phases out for single filers with MAGIs between $75,000 and $90,000, and for joint filers with MAGIs between $155,000 and $185,000. This means that as your MAGI increases within these ranges, the amount of the deduction you can claim is gradually reduced.

For example, a single filer with a MAGI of $80,000 who paid $1,100 in interest on a qualified student loan would calculate their deduction as follows:

1. $1,100 (interest paid) x ($85,000 − $75,000) / $15,000) = $733.33
2. $1,100 − $733.33 = $366.67

This taxpayer would be allowed to claim a Student Loan Interest Deduction of $366.67.

Strategies to Maximize Your Deduction

To maximize your Student Loan Interest Deduction, consider the following strategies:

1. Reduce Your MAGI: Contribute to retirement accounts, such as IRAs or 401(k)s, to lower your taxable income and potentially bring you below the phaseout threshold.

2. Time Your Payments: If possible, time your student loan payments to ensure they are made in a year when your MAGI is lower, such as before the end of the tax year.

3. Consult a Tax Professional: A tax professional can help you understand your specific situation and develop a strategy to maximize your deduction.

Conclusion

The Student Loan Interest Deduction is a valuable tool for reducing your taxable income, but it's important to understand the rules and income limits to maximize your savings. By meeting the eligibility criteria and employing strategies to reduce your MAGI, you can claim the full deduction and keep more of your hard-earned money. So, don't miss out on this opportunity to save on your taxes—claim your Student Loan Interest Deduction today!

data.title: Gotbit Founder Pleads Guilty, Forfeits $23M in Stablecoins
data.description:
Aleksei Andriunin, the founder of crypto market maker Gotbit, has reached a significant plea agreement with federal prosecutors in Massachusetts. This deal involves Andriunin forfeiting approximately $23 million in Tether (USDT) and Circle’s USDC stablecoins, marking a substantial development in the ongoing efforts to combat cryptocurrency market manipulation.

Andriunin, a citizen of Russia, faced serious charges including wire fraud and conspiracy to commit market manipulation. These charges stemmed from Gotbit’s alleged unlicensed operations, which were accused of orchestrating a “widespread cryptocurrency market manipulation scheme.” The scheme involved creating artificial trading volume for various crypto projects globally through practices such as wash trading. Wash trading is an illegal activity where an entity simultaneously buys and sells the same asset to create false volume and mislead other investors.

These activities are alleged to have occurred between 2017 and 2024 while Andriunin served as the CEO of Gotbit. In a 2019 interview, Andriunin himself admitted that Gotbit’s business model was “not entirely ethical,” suggesting an awareness of the legal and ethical issues surrounding their operations.

Under the terms of the plea agreement, Andriunin will plead guilty to conspiracy to commit wire fraud and market manipulation. The original charges carried a maximum sentence of 20 years or more, but the plea agreement could significantly reduce his prison time. Andriunin will serve a 24-month prison sentence followed by 36 months of probation. During his supervised release, he will be prohibited from engaging in any crypto-related activities.

The agreement also stipulates that Andriunin will not be required to pay any additional fines, as the forfeiture of the cryptocurrency gained from the offenses covers the financial penalties. The forfeited assets include nearly $14 million in Tether held in two separate crypto wallets and approximately $9 million in USDC stored in two other wallets. These assets, registered under Gotbit Consulting LLC, are entirely controlled by Andriunin on behalf of Gotbit, highlighting his direct involvement with the illicit funds.

Leah Foley, an official from the US Attorney’s Office for the District of Massachusetts, emphasized that the agreement does not limit the authority of the Attorney General of the United States or any other prosecuting authority. This plea deal represents a significant step in the legal efforts to address market manipulation in the cryptocurrency industry, underscoring the seriousness with which authorities are treating such offenses.

data.title: Maritime Resources Corp. Upsizes Private Placement to $20 Million
data.description:
Maritime Resources Corp. (TSXV: MAE) has announced a significant upsize to its previously declared private placement offering, aiming to raise up to $20,002,500. This move is poised to bolster the company's financial position and accelerate its exploration and development projects, particularly the Hammerdown Gold Project in the Baie Verte District of Newfoundland and Labrador.

The upsized offering will see the issuance of up to 266,700,000 units at a price of $0.075 per unit. Each unit comprises one common share and one-half of one common share purchase warrant. The warrants will be exercisable to acquire one common share at an exercise price of $0.12 per share for 24 months from the closing date. This structure not only provides immediate capital but also offers investors the potential for future gains, aligning their interests with the company's long-term success.



The involvement of high-profile investors such as Eric sprott and Dundee Corporation further underscores the confidence in Maritime Resources Corp.'s prospects. Eric Sprott has committed approximately $4,000,000, while Dundee Corporation has increased its investment to approximately $8,800,000. These investments not only provide substantial financial backing but also enhance the company's credibility and visibility in the market. The participation of such reputable investors can attract additional funding and partnerships, further strengthening Maritime Resources Corp.'s position in the industry.

The net proceeds from the offering will be used for exploration and development activities, as well as for general working capital purposes. This influx of capital will enable the company to accelerate its exploration initiatives, including those related to the Hammerdown Gold Project. The Hammerdown Gold Project is a key asset for Maritime Resources Corp., and the additional funding will support its advancement, potentially leading to significant discoveries and increased production.

The offering is expected to close on or about April 9, 2025, subject to regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions. All securities issued pursuant to the offering will have a hold period of four months and one day, ensuring compliance with securities regulations.



In summary, the upsized private placement offering by Maritime Resources Corp. represents a strategic move to secure the necessary capital for advancing its exploration and development projects. The involvement of prominent investors and the structured offering terms position the company for growth and success in the competitive gold exploration and development sector. As Maritime Resources Corp. continues to advance its projects, investors and industry observers will be watching closely to see the impact of this significant funding round.

data.title: Phillips 66's Wood River Refinery Undergoes Major Turnaround
data.description:
Phillips 66's Wood River refinery, a critical player in the U.S. energy landscape, is currently undergoing a significant turnaround. The refinery, located in Roxana, Illinois, has a capacity of 356,500 barrels per day and is essential for the production of transportation fuels, including gasoline, diesel, and aviation fuel. The turnaround, which began last week, is expected to continue until late April, impacting both current and future fuel supplies.

The turnaround involves maintenance activities at several key units within the refinery. These include the 170,000-bpd crude distillation unit, 50,000-bpd vacuum flasher, 42,000-bpd catalytic cracker unit, and associated gas plant units. These units are crucial for the production of refined products, and their maintenance is necessary to ensure the refinery's long-term operational efficiency and profitability.

The impact of this turnaround on the current supply of transportation fuels is significant. The reduced capacity during the maintenance period is likely to lead to a temporary decrease in the supply of gasoline, diesel, and aviation fuel. This could result in supply shortages in the affected regions, potentially driving up prices for these essential fuels. The broader market implications include increased costs for consumers and businesses that rely on these fuels for transportation and operations.



Looking ahead, the completion of the turnaround is expected to restore the refinery's production capacity, which could help stabilize fuel supplies and prices. However, the timing and duration of the turnaround, as well as any unforeseen issues that may arise during the maintenance work, could impact the refinery's ability to return to full production capacity. This could have implications for future fuel supplies and prices, as well as for the broader energy market.

The key factors driving the timing and duration of the turnaround at the Wood River refinery are primarily related to the maintenance activities required for specific units within the refinery. The complexity and scope of the maintenance tasks required for these units influence the duration of the turnaround. The timing of the turnaround is also influenced by the need to ensure that the refinery can continue to produce transportation fuels without significantly disrupting the supply of these essential fuels. This strategic scheduling helps to minimize the impact on the refinery's operational efficiency and profitability.

The operational efficiency of the refinery is directly affected by the turnaround, as the maintenance activities temporarily reduce the refinery's capacity to process crude oil and produce refined products. However, the turnaround is necessary to ensure that the refinery's equipment remains in good working order and can continue to operate safely and efficiently in the long term. By addressing maintenance issues proactively, the refinery can avoid unplanned downtime and costly repairs, which would have a more significant impact on its operational efficiency and profitability.

The profitability of the refinery is also influenced by the turnaround, as the reduced capacity during the maintenance period can lead to lower production volumes and potentially higher costs. However, the turnaround is an essential investment in the refinery's future performance, as it helps to ensure that the equipment is in good working order and can continue to operate at optimal levels. By completing the turnaround successfully, the refinery can minimize the impact on its profitability and position itself for long-term success.

In conclusion, the ongoing turnaround at Phillips 66's Wood River refinery is a necessary investment in the refinery's future performance. While the maintenance activities are likely to impact current and future fuel supplies, the turnaround is essential to ensure the refinery's long-term operational efficiency and profitability. By completing the turnaround successfully, phillips 66 can minimize the impact on its profitability and position itself for long-term success in the energy market.

data.title: Trump Pushes Fed to Change Crypto Policies, Challenges Independence
data.description:
President Donald Trump is challenging the Federal Reserve's independence by pushing for changes in its policies, with a focus on cryptocurrency-related initiatives. The Fed, which has had final say on key decisions related to the American banking system and U.S. monetary policy since the early 1950s, is now facing pressure from the Trump administration and its Republican allies in Congress.

The White House is planning to issue an executive order that will direct the Fed to change its policies on withholding master accounts from crypto banks. Master accounts allow banks to access the Fed’s financial services and are crucial for serving customers at scale. If approved, this would be a significant victory for the digital assets industry, as only a few crypto-focused banks, such as Kraken Financial and Custodia, would be eligible to receive master accounts.

Trump's executive order, signed last month, declared his right to dictate the Fed’s policies related to the “supervision and regulation of financial institutions.” This includes the Fed’s decision-making related to master accounts. While the Fed will continue to shape its own “monetary policy” on sensitive matters like interest rates, efforts are brewing in Washington to undo even the Fed’s monetary policy independence, with the crypto industry at the center of these plans.

Senator Cynthia Lummis introduced the Bitcoin Act, which would obligate the U.S. government to buy $80 billion worth of Bitcoin to bolster a federal Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. This would be funded by reissuing the Fed's Nixon-era gold certificates at market prices, which have appreciated significantly over the years. The Fed would receive these new, more valuable certificates but would then have to fork over $80 billion to the Treasury Secretary to fund Bitcoin purchases.

A Capitol Hill source with direct knowledge of the thinking behind the Bitcoin Act revealed that legislators and presidents have been hesitant to explicitly direct the Fed for decades. However, this position has now changed, with Republicans emboldened to take a stronger stance on overseeing the policies of ostensibly independent federal agencies due to perceived politicization.

Trump is not the first president to push against the Fed’s independence, but no president has successfully managed to rip key decision-making powers back from the Fed’s governors since the 1950s. If Trump and his congressional allies continue to press forward on this goal, with crypto policy as the tip of the spear, the digital assets industry could see both significant victories and contentious litigation.

One crypto lobbyist noted that the Trump administration appears to be using crypto-related policy as a “test case” for reclaiming control over independent agencies. While this could unlock crucial victories for the crypto industry, it could also associate the industry with a precedent-bucking agenda that is increasingly testing the limits of the U.S. Constitution. The outcome remains uncertain, but the crypto industry is prepared to take advantage of the situation.

data.title: ECB Explores Digital Euro to Counter Stablecoins, Big Tech Influence
data.description:
The European Central Bank (ECB) is actively exploring the introduction of a digital euro to counter the growing influence of stablecoins and non-European big tech companies. Philip Lane, the ECB's Chief Economist, has highlighted the necessity of a digital euro to safeguard the autonomy of the monetary system and ensure public access to central bank money, especially as the use of physical cash declines.

Lane's comments come at a critical juncture, as the ECB is increasingly concerned about the potential dominance of stablecoins. These digital currencies, pegged to the value of stable assets like the US dollar, are often issued by private sector entities and pose a threat to the ECB's ability to control monetary policy and ensure financial stability. By introducing a digital euro, the ECB aims to provide a safe and reliable alternative backed by the central bank, thereby preserving the integrity of the eurozone's financial system.

The ECB's push for a digital euro is also motivated by the need to counter the influence of non-European big tech companies, which have been expanding their financial services offerings. These companies, with their vast user bases and advanced technological capabilities, could potentially disrupt traditional banking systems and challenge the ECB's role in maintaining monetary stability. A digital euro would enable the ECB to compete more effectively in the digital payments landscape and ensure that the euro remains a dominant currency in the global economy.

Lane pointed out that 99% of the stablecoin market is made up of tokens pegged to the U.S. dollar. This raises the possibility of dollar stablecoins gaining traction in the euro area, potentially leading to payments systems becoming "directly or indirectly anchored by the dollar rather than the euro." The ECB, like central banks in other developed economies, is exploring the possibility of introducing a central bank digital currency (CBDC) to address the competition posed by stablecoins and corporate-run payment services.

The case for a CBDC may be greater for the ECB, given that the eurozone encompasses multiple countries. The single currency is used across 20 European Union member states, and the eurozone lacks a unified payment system due to diverse legacy standards from country to country. "The digital euro presents a unique opportunity to overcome the persistent fragmentation in retail payment systems across the euro area," Lane said.

The introduction of a digital euro would also address concerns about privacy and data security. Unlike stablecoins, which are often governed by private entities and may not prioritize user privacy, a digital euro would be subject to stringent regulatory oversight. This would ensure that user data is protected and that transactions are conducted in a secure and transparent manner.

In summary, the ECB's consideration of a digital euro is a strategic move to counter the growing influence of stablecoins and non-European big tech companies. By introducing a digital euro, the ECB aims to maintain the autonomy of the monetary system, ensure public access to central bank money, and compete more effectively in the digital payments landscape. This initiative underscores the ECB's commitment to preserving the integrity of the eurozone's financial system and ensuring that the euro remains a dominant currency in the global economy.

data.title: Capcom's Monster Hunter Wilds: The Game That's Taking the U.S. by Storm!
data.description:
Ladies and gentlemen, buckle up! We've got a monster on our hands, and it's not the kind you'll find in the game. Capcom's latest release, "Monster Hunter Wilds," has stormed the U.S. market, becoming the top-selling game of February 2025. This isn't just a success story; it's a phenomenon that's shaking up the gaming industry. Let's dive in and see what's making this game a must-have!



First things first, the numbers don't lie. "Monster Hunter Wilds" sold over 8 million copies in just three days, making it Capcom's fastest-selling game ever. But that's not all! The launch month dollar sales in the U.S. were more than 40% higher than those of "Monster Hunter: World" in January 2018. That's right, folks! We're talking about a game that's outperforming one of Capcom's all-time best sellers.

Now, let's talk about the platforms. "Monster Hunter Wilds" was the top seller on PlayStation, Xbox, and Steam. Steam alone accounted for over half of the game's total dollar sales. This game is a powerhouse across the board, and it's clear that players can't get enough of it. The game reached more than 1.3 million concurrent players on Steam at launch, becoming the No. 5 most popular Steam game of all time. That's a BOOM, folks!

But what's driving this success? Well, for starters, "Monster Hunter Wilds" is an open-world RPG that offers an immersive experience. Players can explore vast landscapes, battle epic monsters, and customize their characters to their heart's content. It's a game that keeps you coming back for more, and that's exactly what's happening.

Now, let's talk about the implications for Capcom. This success is a game-changer, and it's going to have a significant impact on the company's future. With "Monster Hunter Wilds" performing so well, Capcom is likely to invest more in the franchise. This could mean more games, more content, and more opportunities for players to dive into the world of Monster Hunter.

But it's not just about the games. Capcom is also likely to invest more in digital distribution platforms. With Steam accounting for more than half of the game's total dollar sales, it's clear that digital platforms are where it's at. Capcom might enhance their digital infrastructure, improve their online services, and potentially develop more games tailored for digital platforms.

And let's not forget about marketing. The success of "Monster Hunter Wilds" is a testament to Capcom's marketing prowess. The company has done an incredible job of building hype and excitement around the game, and it's paying off in a big way. Capcom might invest more in marketing campaigns, partnerships, and collaborations to maintain the momentum and attract new players.

So, what does this mean for you? Well, if you're a gamer, you need to own this game. It's a no-brainer! If you're an investor, you need to keep an eye on Capcom. This success is going to have a significant impact on the company's financial health, and it's a trend that's worth watching.

In conclusion, "Monster Hunter Wilds" is a game that's taking the U.S. by storm. It's a phenomenon that's shaking up the gaming industry, and it's a success story that's worth celebrating. Capcom has done an incredible job of building hype and excitement around the game, and it's paying off in a big way. So, buckle up, folks! This is a game that's going to be around for a long time, and it's one that you won't want to miss.

data.title: Another Tesla Investor Is Calling Musk To Quit
data.description:
A prominent tesla investor has stated that Elon Musk should step down as CEO unless he relinquishes his position in the U.S. government.

Ross Gerber, CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management and a well-known Tesla investor, openly expressed during a television appearance that Tesla currently needs a new CEO.

He stated, "It's time for somebody to run Tesla. There are too many important things Tesla is doing, so either Elon should come back to Tesla and be the CEO of Tesla and give up his other jobs, or he should focus on the government and keep doing what he is doing, but find a suitable CEO of Tesla."

Gerber pointed out that Musk's social media remarks and his collaboration with U.S. President Trump have negatively impacted Tesla.

He bluntly said, "The company's reputation has just been destroyed by Elon Musk. Sales are plummeting, so yeah, it's a crisis. You literally can't sell the best product in the marketplace because the CEO is so divisive."

Tesla faces multiple challenges, and Musk himself is one of them.

With the strong support he provided during the election, Musk has become one of Trump's most trusted confidants. He serves as the head of the Department of Government Efficiency (Doge) in the new administration. This is a newly established agency, not strictly part of the federal executive branch, but under Trump's directive, Musk's Department of Government Efficiency has demonstrated influence beyond that of ordinary cabinet-level departments.

Trump's election victory initially significantly boosted Tesla's stock price, which surged from early November last year, reaching a historic high of $488.54 per share. However, Tesla′s stock has fallen more than 41% to $235.86 per share on Wednesday.

While the overall slump in the U.S. stock market has contributed to Tesla's stock price decline, the company itself faces numerous challenges.

Tesla has been struggling with slowing growth in electric vehicle demand and competition eroding its market share. Now, it faces a new challenge: consumer aversion to CEO Elon Musk.

In the first two months of this year, Tesla's sales in the European market plummeted, while overall electric vehicle sales grew during the same period, highlighting a rapid decline in European investors' approval of Tesla.

Meanwhile, public aversion to Musk is intensifying, leading to frequent violent protests. In the U.S., there have been numerous violent incidents targeting Tesla dealerships, supercharger networks, and even private vehicles recently.Additionally, protesters across the U.S. and Europe are urging Tesla owners to sell their cars and calling on Tesla investors to divest from the company's stock.

data.title: 5 Technically Bullish Stocks Signaling Strong Buy, Backed by Solid Fundamentals (with Bonus Sell List)
data.description:
The S&P 500 has bounced back from correction levels as the market digests Trump's tariff war, improved inflation/payroll data, and the Fed's confidence in the overall economy. These factors have created a short-term tactical bullish sentiment, and many stocks are already showing buying signals. Here are our top five picks that are likely to outperform during a market recovery. As Trump's new tariffs approach in April, investors should also hedge against potential shocks, either by using the dynamic hedge strategy we previously mentioned or by noting the bonus short stock list at the end.

Robinhood (HOOD)

Robinhood is showing clear technical signals of a potential reversal. The MA(3) has crossed above the MA(10), a key indication of trend reversal, while the MA(3,7) is turning upward. This suggests bullish momentum is building. The stock is also in the process of retrieving the gap created by its recent tumble, adding further conviction to the upside potential.


On the fundamental side, Robinhood continues to outperform in bullish market conditions due to its wide range of offerings, including equities, ETFs, options, and futures. The platform has expanded its tools to cater to retail investors looking for leverage while also integrating IRA accounts to accommodate various investment needs. Additionally, Robinhood's foray into the betting business provides another revenue stream that could support future growth. The addressable market remains massive as mobile-friendly interfaces attract a new generation of traders.

Block (XYZ)

Block's technical setup is improving, with the MA(3,7) trending upward while the MA(10) is on the verge of turning around. If the MA(10) successfully flips upward, it would confirm a full inflection point, setting the stage for a stronger uptrend.

Fundamentally, Block's Square payments ecosystem remains strong, maintaining a solid market share in digital transactions. Meanwhile, Cash App continues to gain traction, particularly with its latest Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) offerings, which cater to a growing segment of users looking for flexible payment options. The company's expanding ecosystem and increasing user engagement position it well for sustained growth.

Starbucks (SBUX)

Starbucks is exhibiting a bullish technical pattern, with the MA(3) crossing above the MA(7) and flipping to an upward trend. The stock is now approaching the critical $100 psychological resistance level, which, if broken, could pave the way for further upside.

On the fundamental front, U.S. consumer spending remains resilient, supporting Starbucks' strong position in the coffee chain industry. The company's leadership in the sector is reinforced by its brand loyalty and widespread store network. In China, business revival efforts are showing promise, adding another layer of potential growth. Additionally, Starbucks China is exploring potential divestments or strategic collaborations with local partners to optimize its operations in international markets.

Palo Alto Networks (PANW)

Palo Alto Networks continues its bullish trajectory, with the MA(3,7) maintaining an upward trend and a higher-low formation being established. This indicates strong buying interest and a solid technical setup for further gains.

From a fundamental standpoint, the increasing demand for AI and cloud-based applications is driving a parallel need for robust cybersecurity solutions. As the largest player in the cybersecurity segment, Palo Alto Networks is well-positioned to capitalize on this trend. The company's continued innovation in AI-driven security solutions ensures its relevance and dominance in an industry where demand is expected to surge over the coming years.

Oracle (ORCL)

Oracle has rebounded from its post-earnings low and is now testing a key resistance level. The MA(3) has moved above the MA(7,10), reinforcing the bullish trend and providing a buying opportunity.

On the fundamental side, Oracle stands to benefit from multiple growth drivers. Its collaboration with OpenAI, Arm, and the Oracle Stargate project highlights its expanding role in the AI infrastructure space. Furthermore, the TikTok deal is expected to be favorable for Oracle, particularly given Larry Ellison's close ties with Trump, which could result in policy advantages. These factors collectively provide a strong growth narrative for the stock moving forward.

Stocks Warning

Intel: The mania surrounding the incoming CEO is starting to fade, similar to the rise-and-fall pattern observed from Feb. 11 to March 10. The lack of real progress in chip fabrication and continued market share losses to AMD/Nvidia remain fundamental issues. The new CEO needs time to address these challenges, but as a former board member, his ability to turn things around remains uncertain.

Nvidia: Although bullish sentiment can support the stock, the GTC 2025 event was underwhelming, with more powerful GPUs introduced but no major surprises to further boost investor confidence and the growth story. Technically, the MA(3) is trending downward, while the MA(7) is still rising—signaling a slight sell indication.

Netflix: The stock typically tumbles after Q1 earnings due to seasonal fatigue. Investors should closely monitor how ad-supported user growth impacts the overall membership structure and whether the company can attract new members instead of relying solely on conversions.

RTX Technology: The stock has reached a record high, with an RSI of 83 and a higher-high formation on the chart. A short-term pullback is likely.

data.title: Nvidia's 6G Revolution: Why Defiance ETF CEO Sees Big Gains Ahead
data.description:
The future of telecommunications is here, and it's powered by AI. NVIDIA's recent foray into AI-native 6G networks is transforming the industry, and investors are taking notice. Defiance ETFs CEO Sylvia Jablonski believes this revolution is just beginning, and she's positioned her ETFs to capitalize on the opportunities ahead.



NVIDIA's partnerships with industry giants like t-mobile, cisco systems, and MITRE are paving the way for AI-native 6G networks. These networks promise enhanced spectral efficiency, performance, and resource utilization, setting new standards for connectivity. As Jensen Huang, NVIDIA's CEO, put it, "Next-generation wireless networks will be revolutionary, and we have an unprecedented opportunity to ensure AI is woven in from the start."

For telecom companies, staying competitive in this new landscape means investing in AI-powered networks, partnering with AI tech leaders, and upgrading to cutting-edge semiconductor technology. Jablonski emphasizes that "Telecom companies that want to stay competitive will need to invest in AI-powered networks, partner with AI tech leaders and upgrade to cutting-edge semiconductor technology."

The Defiance Connective Technologies ETF (SIXG) is designed to capture this AI-driven telecom revolution. The ETF provides exposure to companies at the forefront of AI, telecom, and semiconductor technologies, positioning it to benefit from the growing demand for AI-driven networking chips, cloud computing infrastructure, and telecom software.

The impact of AI-driven networking chips, cloud computing infrastructure, and telecom software is expected to be profound. Companies like Broadcom Inc (AVGO), Marvell Technology Inc (MRVL), and Qualcomm Inc (QCOM) are likely to see increased demand for their AI-driven networking chips. Cloud computing giants like Amazon.com Inc.'s AMZN AWS, Alphabet Inc.'s GOOGGOOGL Google Cloud, and Oracle Corp (ORCL) are also poised to benefit from the growth in cloud computing infrastructure.

In the short term, telecom companies will likely use AI-driven efficiency to increase their profits as they recover infrastructure investment costs. Over time, as AI optimizes network operations, consumers could see more competitive pricing and improved services. This increased profitability will benefit ETFs like SIXG that hold stocks of telecom companies.

Jablonski also highlights the importance of cybersecurity in this new era of AI-native 6G networks. ETFs like the First Trust Nasdaq Cybersecurity ETF (CIBR) cover cybersecurity companies such as Palo Alto Networks Inc (PANW) and CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (CRWD), which will be instrumental in protecting these networks.

The advancements in AI-driven networking chips, cloud computing infrastructure, and telecom software are expected to significantly impact the performance and profitability of semiconductor and telecom ETFs like Defiance Connective Technologies ETF (SIXG). As the demand for AI-driven technologies continues to grow, ETFs that provide exposure to these sectors are well-positioned to benefit from the opportunities ahead.

In conclusion, the integration of AI into 6G networks, as spearheaded by nvidia, is fundamentally altering the competitive landscape for telecom companies. By investing in AI-powered networks, partnering with AI tech leaders, and upgrading to cutting-edge semiconductor technology, telecom companies can position themselves to capitalize on the opportunities presented by AI-native 6G networks. ETFs like Defiance Connective Technologies ETF (SIXG) are well-positioned to benefit from these advancements, offering investors a way to participate in the AI-driven telecom revolution.

data.title: TON Secures $400 Million Funding Led by Sequoia, Benchmark
data.description:
The Open Network (TON), a blockchain platform integrated with the Telegram messaging app, has secured $400 million in funding from several prominent venture capital firms. This substantial investment was led by Sequoia Capital, Ribbit, Benchmark, and Kingsway, with additional contributions from Vy Capital, Draper Associates, and Libertus Capital. The funds are earmarked to support TON's ambitious goal of engaging over 450 million active users of Telegram, which constitutes approximately 30% of the total user base, by 2028. This investment is poised to enhance the Telegram ecosystem and accelerate the adoption of blockchain technology.

The $400 million investment in the TON Foundation highlights the increasing interest and confidence in blockchain technology and its transformative potential across various sectors. The funding will empower TON to expand its infrastructure and develop innovative applications that can capitalize on Telegram's extensive user base. The participation of leading venture capital firms in this funding round underscores their belief in TON's potential to emerge as a dominant force in the blockchain industry.

This successful fundraising effort marks a pivotal moment for the blockchain industry, illustrating the growing interest and investment in this technology. The funds will enable TON to enhance its infrastructure and create new applications that can leverage Telegram's vast user base. The involvement of prominent venture capital firms in this round further validates the potential of TON to become a leading player in the blockchain space. This investment is expected to drive significant advancements in the Telegram ecosystem and foster broader adoption of blockchain technology.

data.title: Trump Establishes US Bitcoin Reserve, Vows No Sales
data.description:
On March 6, President Donald Trump signed an executive order establishing the United States' strategic Bitcoin reserve and digital asset reserve, fulfilling a promise made during his 2024 re-election campaign. This move underscores the administration's commitment to positioning the United States as a leader in the cryptocurrency sector. The executive order aims to provide a clear roadmap for innovation, particularly in areas such as stablecoins and institutional involvement in digital assets.

Trump is set to make history as the first U.S. leader to address a major cryptocurrency conference. He will deliver a recorded speech at the New York Digital Asset Summit, emphasizing the pivotal role of Bitcoin in national economic policy. This speech is expected to further solidify his stance on digital currencies and their integration into the broader economic framework.

During the first-ever White House cryptocurrency summit, Trump announced that the U.S. government will not sell any of its held Bitcoin, confirming that the federal government possesses 200,000 Bitcoins. This decision comes after the government was criticized for previously selling a significant portion of its Bitcoin holdings in a manner deemed "reckless" by the president. The summit highlights the administration's efforts to establish a more strategic approach to managing digital assets, ensuring that the U.S. remains at the forefront of technological and financial innovation.

The establishment of the strategic Bitcoin reserve and digital asset reserve is a significant step towards creating a regulatory framework that supports the growth of the cryptocurrency industry. Industry experts believe that clear regulations will provide a greater advantage than merely holding strategic reserves of Bitcoin. This move is part of a broader effort to foster innovation and ensure that the U.S. maintains its leadership position in the global digital asset landscape.

The administration's focus on digital assets is not limited to Bitcoin. The executive order also addresses the regulation of stablecoins, which are digital currencies pegged to the value of another asset, such as the U.S. dollar. By providing a clear regulatory path for stablecoins, the administration aims to enhance market stability and protect consumers from the risks associated with volatile digital currencies.

The White House cryptocurrency summit is a testament to the administration's commitment to leveraging digital assets for economic growth. The event brings together key stakeholders, including industry leaders, policymakers, and representatives from various sectors, to discuss the future of digital currencies and their role in the U.S. economy. The summit is expected to set the stage for further developments in the cryptocurrency sector, including the implementation of new regulations and the exploration of innovative use cases for digital assets.

data.title: Bitnomial Launches First CFTC-Regulated XRP Futures in US
data.description:
Bitnomial, a digital asset derivatives exchange, has launched the first-ever CFTC-regulated XRP futures in the US. This move follows the company’s voluntary dismissal of its lawsuit against the SEC, which came shortly after Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse announced that the SEC would drop its appeal against Ripple. This development confirms that XRP is no longer considered a security under current law.

Last October, Bitnomial filed a lawsuit against the SEC, challenging the regulator's claim that XRP futures are ‘security futures’ under its jurisdiction. Bitnomial argued that XRP futures do not meet the definition of security futures and opposed the additional regulatory requirements stipulated by the SEC. With the SEC’s evolving policies on crypto, Bitnomial believes there is no longer a need for litigation, stating that regulatory certainty is essential for fostering innovation and growth in the digital asset space.

The newly launched investment product aims to provide traders with a regulated way to gain exposure to XRP, with contracts delivered in actual XRP upon settlement. Luke Hoersten, CEO of Bitnomial, emphasized the company's commitment to building a regulated market infrastructure that supports real asset ownership in digital asset markets. He noted that physically settled futures ensure that every contract is backed by actual XRP, reinforcing true price discovery and market integrity.

The Chicago-based exchange also offers offerings tied to other digital assets like Solana, Avalanche, Chainlink, Bitcoin Cash, Litecoin, Ethereum, Polkadot, and Hedera. This launch is expected to boost market liquidity and strengthen XRP’s role in the broader financial sector. Institutional investors, who have been cautious due to regulatory uncertainties, can now access these regulated derivative products. This move is likely to spark rising speculation about the approval of an XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF), as futures contracts have historically played a crucial role in the approval process for other cryptocurrencies.

Bitnomial’s decision to launch XRP futures follows a period of regulatory uncertainty. Initially, the SEC opposed Bitnomial’s plans to introduce these contracts, arguing that they should be considered securities. This led to a legal dispute, which Bitnomial initiated by challenging the SEC’s regulatory authority. However, following Ripple’s court victory against the SEC and the agency’s dropped appeal, Bitnomial chose to withdraw its lawsuit voluntarily. This regulatory clarity is a significant development for institutional investors who were previously uncertain about the legal status of XRP derivatives.

The launch of XRP futures is also expected to have a broader impact on the market. Increased regulatory clarity positions XRP for wider acceptance among institutions, potentially leading to higher liquidity and innovative developments. The current futures contract functions as a catalyst to expand overall adoption while clearing a path for new crypto-based investment products. With approved XRP futures, the introduction of an XRP ETF now appears likely, representing a notable change in the digital asset’s market trajectory.

Bitnomial’s approved XRP futures contract marks a significant achievement for the cryptocurrency sector. The launch of these futures contracts provides traders with tools to hedge against price volatility and better manage potential risks. Institutional investors seeking structured and regulated access to XRP will find these contracts useful. This introduction of futures supports the increasing role of crypto derivatives in mainstream finance and overall market development. The SEC’s decision to delegate crypto cases implies a potential shift in digital asset classification and future regulation. As more financial institutions examine XRP derivatives, markets should anticipate higher liquidity and innovative developments.
